description.value: GPX Diamonds is a distinguished jewelry store in New Delhi, specializing in a breathtaking array of IGI certified lab grown diamonds. Their curated collection features exquisite cuts like Oval, Heart, Emerald, and Radiant, showcasing vibrant hues such as Fancy Vivid Pink, Intense Blue, and Vivid Yellow, all meticulously crafted with exceptional clarity.

bio.value: GPX Diamonds is designed for jewelers. Check out our website, you might find the diamonds you're looking for and really like.

media_assets.product_name: 1.56 CT Oval F / VS1 Lab Grown Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: A single oval-shaped diamond is held by black-tipped tweezers against a plain, solid grey background. The diamond exhibits brilliant faceting and strong sparkle, appearing colorless. No visible inclusions are apparent, indicating good clarity.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A sparkling oval-cut loose diamond held by black tweezers against a plain grey background, showcasing its brilliant facets.

media_assets.product_name: 1.51 Carat Intense Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, SI1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond with a vibrant blue hue. Its step-cut facets are clearly visible, creating parallel lines and geometric patterns within the stone. Small, dark inclusions are discernible upon close inspection, particularly along the edges and within the facets. The diamond is presented against a plain, neutral grey background, highlighting its color and cut.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant blue emerald-cut loose diamond with visible step facets and minor inclusions, presented on a grey background.

media_assets.product_name: Radiant cut 1.40 Ct Vivid Blue Lab Grown Diamond VS1 quality
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose radiant cut diamond, oriented vertically. It exhibits a vibrant, consistent blue color with strong internal brilliance and sparkle from its numerous facets. The diamond appears eye-clean and is presented against a plain, solid grey background, typical of a studio product shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant blue radiant cut loose diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets and rich color against a plain grey background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.14 Carat Vivid Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut gemstone, exhibiting a vibrant and deep blue color. The stone is presented against a plain, neutral grey background, emphasizing its color and cut.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid blue emerald-cut loose diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets and deep color against a plain grey background.

media_assets.product_name: 3.01Ct Intense Pink Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond with a distinct fancy pink hue. The diamond appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, solid gray background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The diamond shows excellent brilliance and sparkle from its intricate faceting.

Its color appears near-colorless to colorless, and no visible inclusions are apparent.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a brilliant radiant cut diamond, appearing near-colorless and eye-clean, against a stark white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The diamond is positioned upright, likely on a small, dark display stand that is partially visible at the bottom.

The diamond appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, light grey or white studio background, possibly resting on a small, dark stand.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant fancy vivid yellow pear-shaped loose diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets against a clean white background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.13 carat Emerald step cut diamond | Vivid Pink Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, rectangular emerald-cut diamond held by black tweezers against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits a distinct pink hue with strong saturation, showing clear step facets and good brilliance. Its surface appears clean with no visible inclusions, indicating high clarity.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid pink emerald-cut diamond held by black tweezers against a grey background, showcasing its step facets and brilliant color.

media_assets.product_name: Pear-Cut Crystal Flower Dainty Necklace in 14k/18k Gold
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a dainty gold necklace featuring a central curved bar adorned with multiple sparkling gemstones. The gemstones are arranged in a floral motif, primarily pear-shaped with smaller round stones at the centers of the flowers and ends of the bar. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate design and brilliant appearance.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Dainty gold necklace with a curved bar featuring multiple pear and round colorless gemstones arranged in a floral motif.

media_assets.product_name: Multi-Round Diamond Necklace Crafted in Hallmarked Gold – Everyday Elegance

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Five circular diamond cluster motifs, pave/halo setting, delicate chain.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate gold necklace featuring five circular diamond-set motifs arranged in a gentle curve. Each motif consists of a central cluster of small, round diamonds surrounded by a halo of even smaller, round diamonds, all set in what appears to be yellow gold. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its sparkle and intricate design.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A delicate gold necklace with five sparkling circular diamond cluster motifs, each featuring a central diamond cluster and a halo.

media_assets.product_name: Timeless Trio Diamond Halo Pendant Necklace in Hallmarked 14K/18K Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: three distinct pendants, one round and two pear-shaped, all with diamond halos

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate gold necklace featuring a trio of diamond halo pendants against a clean white background. The central pendant is a round brilliant diamond surrounded by a halo of smaller diamonds, flanked on either side by a pear-shaped diamond also encircled by a diamond halo. The gold chain is a fine link style, suggesting a high-quality, elegant piece.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Gold necklace with a central round diamond halo pendant flanked by two pear-shaped diamond halo pendants on a white background.

media_assets.product_name: Halo Round Diamond Necklace in Hallmarked Gold | Gift-Ready Jewellery

visual_features.shape_visible: round brilliant (for individual stones), floral cluster (for pendant)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: multiple round stones forming a cluster pendant

The pendant consists of seven round brilliant-cut stones, likely diamonds, arranged in a symmetrical flower pattern, each secured with prongs. The overall presentation is simple and highlights the jewelry piece.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A delicate gold chain necklace featuring a floral cluster pendant with seven sparkling round brilliant diamonds on a white background.

media_assets.product_name: Princess and Pear Cut Diamond Earrings in Hallmarked Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: two hoop earrings, alternating pear and princess cut diamonds

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of yellow gold hoop earrings, each adorned with alternating pear and princess cut diamonds. The diamonds appear colorless and eye-clean, set in a channel-like fashion along the front curve of the hoops. The product is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its polished finish and sparkling stones.

catalog_items.description: This is a beautiful diamond ring featuring a 2 carat pear-shaped center diamond. The ring is crafted in gold, with options for 14k, 18k, or 22k gold in yellow, white, or rose gold colors. The center diamond is IGI certified.

specifications.Gold Color Options: Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold

social_source.caption:
This is a beautiful diamond ring with a 2 carat pear-shaped diamond in the center. The center diamond is IGI certified, which means it has been checked and approved by a trusted gem experts' group.

The ring is made of gold, and you can choose from three different types of gold:

14k gold
18k gold
22k gold
You can also choose from three colors of gold:

Yellow Gold
White Gold
Rose Gold
No matter which type or color of gold you choose, we guarantee that it is pure. The gold has been checked and approved by a trusted third-party group.

The ring also has small side diamonds. These diamonds are between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat each. They add extra sparkle to the ring.

In summary:

The ring has a 2 carat pear-shaped center diamond.
The center diamond is IGI certified.
You can choose from 14k, 18k, or 22k gold.
The gold can be yellow, white, or rose.
The gold is guaranteed pure and certified by a third-party.
The ring has small side diamonds between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat.
This ring is perfect for anyone who loves diamonds and wants a beautiful, certified piece of jewelry.

social_profiles.bio:
GPX Diamonds is a highly reputed diamond seller in the world, known for its exceptional quality, unparalleled craftsmanship, and outstanding customer service. With a commitment to excellence and a passion for diamonds, GPX Diamonds has become a trusted name in the diamond industry, catering to customers from all over the world.

Overall, GPX Diamonds is a highly respected and reputable diamond seller in Delhi NCR, India, known for its exceptional quality, outstanding customer service, and commitment to sustainability and ethical practices. This is a beautiful diamond ring with a 2 carat pear-shaped diamond in the center. The center diamond is IGI certified, which means it has been checked and approved by a trusted gem experts' group.

The ring is made of gold, and you can choose from three different types of gold:

14k gold
18k gold
22k gold
You can also choose from three colors of gold:

Yellow Gold
White Gold
Rose Gold
No matter which type or color of gold you choose, we guarantee that it is pure. The gold has been checked and approved by a trusted third-party group.

The ring also has small side diamonds. These diamonds are between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat each. They add extra sparkle to the ring.

In summary:

The ring has a 2 carat pear-shaped center diamond.
The center diamond is IGI certified.
You can choose from 14k, 18k, or 22k gold.
The gold can be yellow, white, or rose.
The gold is guaranteed pure and certified by a third-party.

plan_execution.reasoning: The seller record contains a company profile, 425 raw products (will process up to 20), and a reviews API URL. Therefore, all core agents (company, product, reviews, dedup) are needed. The quality target is set to 0.85 to ensure high-quality output for auto-publishing.
